title: Let Monday.com schedule tasks to earliest or latest date

posts.author: mr.gzx (Martin Goizioux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.
I’m giving Monday.com another shot at Project management. I loved its user-friendly interface and that its cloud-based, etc. but can it handles multiple extensive projects ?

I’m targeting to manage multiple projects containing multiple tasks with potentially multiple dependencies of multiple types (Start-Start, Start-Finish, Finish-Finish & Finish-Start)…

I’m wondering if we can let Monday.com manage tasks timing as we can do with Microsoft Project. In Project, we can ask to scheduled a task on its earliest or latest date based of dependencies & task completion status…

Does anyone knows how to do it ? Or I should stuck with Project for complex projects ?

Thanks for your help,

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Martin!

While it might not be the exact same workflow and conditions you can set in Microsoft Project, you should be able to achieve something similar with our dependencies automations.

Have you tried testing this feature out for your workflow?

Let us know what you think!
